case_title: WILLIAM HALL SERVIS JR et al VS. PENELOPE ANNE GIANNINI

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER SERVIS JR, WILLIAM HALL LENT, RAYMOND LAWRENCE MCCLURG CAPITAL CORPORATION THE MCCLURG FAMILY TRUST MCCLURG, DAVID GRANVILLE MCCLURG, TRACY NIEDERKORN, JOSEPH HEARING SET FOR APR-18-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER SERVIS JR, WILLIAM HALL LENT, RAYMOND LAWRENCE MCCLURG CAPITAL CORPORATION THE MCCLURG FAMILY TRUST MCCLURG, DAVID GRANVILLE MCCLURG, TRACY NIEDERKORN, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GIANNINI, PENELOPE ANNE SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS
ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND EXPUNGING ARBITRATION FROM RECORDS OF WILLIAM HALL SERVIS, JR.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS WILLIAM SERVIS, RAYMOND LENT, MCCLURG CAPITAL CORPORATION, THE MCCLURG FAMILY TRUST, DAVID MCCLURG, TRACY MCCLURG AND JOSEPH NIEDERKORN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CONFIRMING AARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONERS

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Wakukawa, Esq., of Markun Zusman Compton LLP, Tel. 415.438.4515, appearing for Petitoner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS WILLIAM SERVIS, RAYMOND LENT, MCCLURG CAPITAL CORPORATION, THE MCCLURG FAMILY TRUST, DAVID MCCLURG, TRACY MCCLURG AND JOSEPH NIEDERKORN'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
